{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Rising Earth
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Rising Earth team]] missed their arrival date last week.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
